text.title: Parking Lot Protocol — Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for the parking-lot canvas, the triage hand-off, and the per-item response log.

forbidden.pattern: item.quote_verbatim is empty OR is a paraphrase ("user wants...")
multiple items share a response_log entry (bulk response anti-pattern)
parking-lot canvas not visible during the meeting (private notes only)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Merge two items that are obvious duplicates from the same requester at the same moment — but only with the requester's confirmation.
Split an item into two if the verbatim quote contains two distinct asks.
Extend response SLA to 72h if explicit holiday or out-of-office is in effect; communicate the extended SLA to the requester at the meeting.

list.item: Every item has a verbatim quote and named requester
Canvas was visible during the meeting (recording / screenshot confirms)
Each item received a per-item response within 48h
Parking-lot ageing report shows zero items overdue at end of day
